_notes.default: No CORS, no CSP. SOP only. fetch() to other ports blocked.
_notes.mode1: CORS wildcard (*). All cross-origin fetch() allowed.
_notes.csp-strict: CSP: default-src 'self'. Everything from other ports blocked.
_notes.csp-balanced: CSP: scripts only from :3000 :4000 :6000. Port 5000 blocked.
_notes.mode-insecure: Balanced CSP but NO SRI. CDN breach alert fires unchecked.
_notes.mode-sri-active: Balanced CSP + SRI hash on react-mock.js. CDN breach blocked.
